cases.title: Parse stable syntax, namespace, selector, cascade, variable, and conditional-rule CSS

spec.section: CSS Custom Properties for Cascading Variables Level 1

assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump for stable syntax, selector, cascade, variable, and conditional-rule constructs.

cases.title: Parse stable values, color, geometry-adjacent, media query, and easing CSS
assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump for stable value, color, media-query, easing, and geometry-adjacent declarations.

cases.title: Parse stable box, containment, display, flex, grid, multicol, fragmentation, and scrolling CSS
assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump for stable box, containment, layout, fragmentation, and scrolling declarations.

cases.title: Parse stable font, text, text-decoration, and writing-mode CSS
assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump for stable font, text, text-decoration, and writing-mode declarations.

cases.title: Parse stable counter style and list generated-content CSS
assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump for stable counter style and list generated-content declarations.

cases.title: Parse stable background, image, mask, shape, transform, compositing, and color-adjustment CSS
assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump for stable paint, image, mask, shape, transform, compositing, will-change, and color-adjustment declarations.

cases.title: Parse renderer-breadth layout, overflow, logical, table, region, and round-display CSS

spec.section: CSS Logical Properties and Values Level 1

assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump for renderer-breadth layout, overflow, logical, table, region, exclusion, line-grid, and round-display declarations.

cases.title: Parse renderer-breadth text, font, ruby, list, pseudo-element, and generated-content CSS

spec.section: CSS Generated Content for Paged Media

assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump for renderer-breadth text, font, ruby, list, pseudo-element, shadow-part, and generated-content declarations.

cases.title: Parse renderer-breadth image, mask, filter, shape, transform, compositing, border, and color CSS

spec.section: CSS Image Values and Replaced Content Level 4
CSS Borders and Box Decorations Level 4

assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump for renderer-breadth image, mask, filter, shape, transform, compositing, border, and modern color declarations.

cases.title: Parse renderer-breadth media query, paged media, viewport, supports, and UI CSS
assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump for renderer-breadth media query, paged media, viewport, supports, and UI declarations.

cases.title: Parse cross-module CSS interactions for logical layout, grid alignment, overflow, text decoration, and paint clipping

spec.section: CSS Logical Properties and Values Level 1

assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump for cross-module renderer interactions spanning logical properties, grid alignment, overflow, text decoration, and background clipping.

cases.title: Parse draft syntax, scoping, selectors, cascade, conditional, and mixin CSS
assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump or stable no-crash behavior for draft syntax, scoping, selectors, cascade, conditional, and mixin constructs.

cases.title: Parse draft registered custom property CSS

spec.section: CSS Properties and Values API Level 1

assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump or stable no-crash behavior for registered custom property declarations and uses.

cases.title: Parse draft containment, anchor positioning, display, gap decoration, and positioning CSS
assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump or stable no-crash behavior for draft containment, anchor positioning, display, gap decoration, and positioned layout declarations.

cases.title: Parse draft values, environment variables, easing, and font CSS
assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump or stable no-crash behavior for draft value functions, environment variables, easing functions, and font declarations.

cases.title: Parse early-draft scrolling, overflow, multicolumn, fragmentation, and page-float CSS
assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump or stable no-crash behavior for early-draft scrolling, overflow, multicolumn, fragmentation, overscroll, and page-float declarations.

cases.title: Parse early-draft background, fill/stroke, color HDR, image animation, and CSS2 preview paint CSS
assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump or stable no-crash behavior for early-draft background, fill/stroke, color HDR, image animation, and CSS2 preview paint declarations.

cases.title: Compute Phase 2 CSS cascade, selector functions, scoped syntax, nesting syntax, and conditional styles
assertions: The computed-style dumper emits deterministic style output for cascade priority, selector functions, media rules, scoped syntax, and nested selector syntax in an HTML document.

cases.title: Compute Phase 2 CSS values, box shorthands, font shorthand, and value normalization
assertions: The computed-style dumper emits deterministic style output for representative value units, shorthands, longhands, borders, radii, font shorthand, and opacity.

cases.title: Compute Phase 2 CSS custom properties, style attributes, inheritance, var fallback, and currentColor

spec.section: CSS Custom Properties for Cascading Variables Level 1

assertions: The computed-style dumper emits deterministic style output for CSS custom property substitution, inline style attributes, inheritance, fallback values, and currentColor resolution.

cases.title: Compute Phase 2 CSS registered custom property declarations and use sites

spec.section: CSS Properties and Values API Level 1
CSS Custom Properties for Cascading Variables Level 1

assertions: The computed-style dumper emits deterministic style output for registered custom property syntax, initial values, inheritance metadata, and var() use sites.

cases.title: Layout and render Phase 3 CSS box, display, sizing, positioning, containment, logical, and draft core layout probes

spec.section: CSS Logical Properties and Values Level 1

assertions: The layout dumper and renderer emit deterministic geometry and pixels for representative box model, display, sizing, positioning, containment, logical-property, and draft core layout probes.

cases.title: Layout and render Phase 3 CSS overflow, scrolling, scroll snap, scrollbars, and scroll anchoring probes
assertions: The layout dumper and renderer emit deterministic geometry and pixels for overflow clipping, scroll containers, scroll snap declarations, scrollbar styling declarations, and scroll anchoring declarations.

cases.title: Layout and render Phase 3 CSS UI, viewport units, and static form-control probes
assertions: The layout dumper and renderer emit deterministic geometry and pixels for CSS UI declarations, viewport-relative sizing, and static HTML form controls.

cases.title: Layout and render Phase 4 CSS flexbox, grid, subgrid, and box-alignment probes
assertions: The layout dumper and renderer emit deterministic geometry and pixels for flex containers, grid containers, alignment declarations, explicit grid placement, and subgrid syntax probes.

cases.title: Layout and render Phase 4 CSS table, multicolumn, line-grid, regions, and exclusions probes
assertions: The layout dumper and renderer emit deterministic geometry and pixels for CSS table display, multicolumn declarations, line-grid declarations, regions declarations, and exclusions declarations.

cases.title: Layout and render Phase 4 CSS media query, paged media, fragmentation, and page-float probes
assertions: The layout dumper and renderer emit deterministic geometry and pixels for media queries, range media syntax, paged-media rules, fragmentation declarations, and page-float declarations.

cases.title: Layout and render Phase 4 CSS lists, counters, counter styles, generated content, and GCPM probes

spec.section: CSS Generated Content for Paged Media

assertions: The layout dumper and renderer emit deterministic geometry and pixels for list markers, counters, generated pseudo-element content, counter style syntax, and GCPM declarations.

cases.title: Compute, layout, and render Phase 5 CSS font face, fallback, feature, and variation probes
assertions: The computed-style dumper, layout dumper, and renderer emit deterministic output for @font-face loading, font fallback, feature settings, alternates, variation settings, font palette syntax, and font synthesis declarations.

cases.title: Compute, layout, and render Phase 5 CSS inline text, decoration, transform, wrapping, and ruby probes
assertions: The computed-style dumper, layout dumper, and renderer emit deterministic output for inline text wrapping, text decoration, text transform, word breaking, ruby fallback layout, and ruby annotation declarations.

cases.title: Compute, layout, and render Phase 5 CSS writing-mode, logical text, and bidi probes
assertions: The computed-style dumper, layout dumper, and renderer emit deterministic output for vertical writing modes, text orientation, logical sizing and borders, direction, unicode-bidi, and mixed-direction line layout.

cases.title: Stress CSS declaration shorthands, longhands, cascade, inheritance, and custom property cycles

spec.section: CSS Custom Properties for Cascading Variables Level 1

assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump or stable no-crash behavior for declaration matrices, cascade layers, inheritance, invalid-at-computed-value-time substitutions, and custom property cycles.

cases.title: Stress CSS selector specificity, large selector lists, media queries, supports, and container queries
assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump or stable no-crash behavior for large selector lists, specificity-heavy selectors, media-query permutations, supports rules, and container queries.

cases.title: Stress CSS calc trees, layout constraints, gradients, and paint-order combinations
assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump or stable no-crash behavior for large calc/function trees, min/max layout constraints, repeated gradients, filters, and paint-order combinations.

cases.title: Stress deeply nested selectors, custom property chains, large selector lists, and repeated rules

spec.section: CSS Custom Properties for Cascading Variables Level 1

assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump or stable no-crash behavior for deep selector chains, long custom property chains, large selector lists, repeated conditional rules, and extreme layout bounds.

cases.title: Classify CSS-adjacent resource isolation across remote, data, and local HTML resource references
assertions: The resource log classifies stylesheet, font preload, image, media, object, embed, iframe, input-image, and script URLs without network access while retaining CSS source references for @import, @font-face, cursor URLs, data URLs, and blocked remote resources.

cases.title: Display-list and render Phase 6 CSS background, color, and border paint probes
assertions: The display-list dumper and renderer emit deterministic paint primitives and pixels for layered backgrounds, background clipping, border radii, border-area clipping, currentColor, color-adjustment declarations, and modern color function fallbacks.

cases.title: Display-list and render Phase 6 CSS images, masks, and shapes probes
assertions: The display-list dumper and renderer emit deterministic paint primitives and pixels for gradient images, conic/radial image functions, image-set fallbacks, clip-path, mask declarations, and shape-outside static flow.

cases.title: Display-list and render Phase 6 CSS effects, compositing, and transforms probes
assertions: The display-list dumper and renderer emit deterministic paint primitives and pixels for opacity, blend modes, filters, transform matrices, transform origins, 3D transform fallbacks, and will-change declarations.

cases.title: Display-list and render Phase 6 CSS pseudo, shadow, and gap paint probes

spec.section: CSS Borders and Box Decorations Level 4

assertions: The display-list dumper and renderer emit deterministic paint primitives and pixels for pseudo-element generated content, text shadow, box shadow, flex gaps, marker styling, part selector parsing, and gap-decoration declarations.

cases.title: Parse Phase 7 runtime-boundary CSS dynamic timeline syntax
assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump or stable no-crash behavior for dynamic timeline syntax while the browser-runtime animation, transition, scroll-timeline, view-transition, motion-path, and Web Animations APIs remain outside static renderer release gates.

cases.title: Parse Phase 7 runtime-boundary CSSOM and Houdini-adjacent syntax
assertions: The CSS parser emits a deterministic stylesheet dump or stable no-crash behavior for CSSOM/Houdini-adjacent stylesheet syntax while script-visible CSSOM, Typed OM, worklet, highlight registry, resize observer, and navigation runtimes remain outside static renderer release gates.
